hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
path = d.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
if path.endswith('.swift'):
    print(f'[wamp] Swift file modified: {path.split("/")[-1]} — run /build-reload to rebuild and relaunch')
"
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your input" with title "Wamp Dev" sound name "Submarine"'

bash -c 'cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" && status=$(git status --short) && branch=$(git branch --show-current) && echo "[wamp] Branch: $branch" && if [ -n "$status" ]; then echo "[wamp] Uncommitted changes:"; echo "$status"; else echo "[wamp] Working tree clean"; fi'
